title: Pot Leaves
description: This is a small mod for decoration with pots and leaves.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f21881d475634e80b0e4636a5d507d0969b5a6db.png)

This is a small mod for decoration with pots and leaves.

With this mod you will be able to decorate your world with some pots & leaves 
that fit in your build.

This mod adds different pot styles such as:
- Wood
- Marmol
- Desert
- Bamboo

And many more are coming soon

You can view more pot images in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/pot-leaves/gallery)

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc02f997764c6657ba27ff7a8942f4af7e708371.png)
